title: hieracium saxatile subsp. candidum
intro: Hieracium saxatile subsp. candidum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its white flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and urinary tract issues. The health benefits of Hieracium saxatile subsp. candidum include reducing pain and swelling, as well as supporting kidney function and promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for use in herbal remedies, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
